hero.headline: Your AI agent answers every call. Instantly. Connected to your business.
hero.subheadline: Replace your customer service phone line with an AI voice agent that books appointments, queries your database, and resolves issues — 24/7, without human intervention.
hero.socialProof: Trusted by companies in healthcare, legal, real estate, hospitality, e-commerce, and tourism

howItWorks.title: From phone ring to resolved — in seconds

step1.title: Customer calls
step1.description: Your phone number rings. Our infrastructure intercepts and routes to the AI agent instantly.

step2.title: Agent understands
step2.description: Natural language processing captures intent. The agent queries your MCP servers in real-time (calendar, CRM, database, etc.)

step3.title: Issue resolved
step3.description: Appointment booked. Question answered. Ticket created. No human needed.

features.title: Enterprise AI infrastructure. Zero call center headcount.

mcp.title: MCP-Native Integration
mcp.description: Connect any business tool — CRM, calendar, database, ticketing — using the open MCP standard. Build once, deploy everywhere.

latency.title: Sub-300ms Latency
latency.description: Responses so fast callers never feel the pause. Our infrastructure is co-located with telephony PoPs for ultra-low roundtrip.

voice.title: Natural Voice, Zero Script
voice.description: Powered by the latest speech-to-speech models. No IVR menus. No robotic responses. Just natural conversation.

concurrent.title: Unlimited Concurrent Calls
concurrent.description: One agent handles one call or ten thousand simultaneously. Scale without hiring.

analytics.title: Full Conversation Analytics
analytics.description: Every call transcribed, tagged, and analyzed. Know what your customers are really asking.

security.title: GDPR & SOC2 Ready
security.description: Enterprise-grade security and compliance out of the box. HIPAA compliance available.

socialProof.title: Built for the businesses that can't afford to miss a call

pricing.title: Transparent pricing. No call center headcount.
pricing.disclaimer: No long-term contracts. Pay monthly. HIPAA compliance add-on available. Custom MCP server integration included in Growth and Enterprise.

items.q: What is MCP and why does it matter?
items.a: MCP (Model Context Protocol) is the open standard developed by Anthropic that lets AI agents connect to any business tool. It means our agent can book in your calendar, look up your database, or update your CRM — in real time during the call.

items.q: Will callers know they're talking to an AI?
items.a: Our agents are transparent when required, but they sound and respond like humans. Most businesses choose to disclose — and customers don't mind when the experience is faster and more helpful.
A standard integration with 2-3 MCP servers takes 2-5 business days. We handle the setup.

items.q: What happens when the AI can't resolve an issue?
items.a: The agent seamlessly transfers the call to a human agent with a full context summary. No caller left behind.
All calls are encrypted in transit and at rest. We offer SOC2 compliance as standard and HIPAA compliance for healthcare customers.

items.q: Do you support languages other than English?
items.a: Yes. Our agents support 30+ languages. Spanish, French, Portuguese, German and more out of the box.
